CustomMetadata.label: CAI-001 - Connected App with IP restriction relaxed

values.value: Connected App with IP restriction relaxed
A Connected App has IpRelaxation set to BYPASS or RELAX. OAuth tokens issued by this app can be used from any IP address, bypassing the org IP restriction settings.
OAuth tokens issued by this app bypass the org IP restrictions entirely. A stolen OAuth token can be used from any location in the world, including high-risk regions.
Set IP Relaxation to Enforce IP restrictions on the Connected App in Setup > Connected Apps. If needed for mobile users, use Relax IP restrictions with second factor rather than BYPASS.
